positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene featuring a group of diverse, smiling woodland creatures (fox, owl, bunny, raccoon) gathering around a glowing, floating lantern. The composition is circular and central, emphasizing the collective joy. Style: Vintage woodcut illustration meets modern whimsical pop art. Color direction: Deep forest emerald greens, earthy terracotta browns, pops of saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, ruby red) for contrast. Lighting: Soft, dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, contrasting with the warm, glowing light emanating from the lantern. Print details: Perfect symmetry, clean linework suitable for screen printing, highly contrasted silhouettes, isolated elements against a slightly textured cream background.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, lowres, worst quality, grain, ugly, noise, cropped, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, disfigured, signature, logo, cartoon, anime, realistic photo
